---
title: "Result"
author: "Ka Long"
date: "11/17/2021"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r load-library, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
require(knitr)
require(arsenal)
require(readr)
require(car)
require(dlookr)
require(Hmisc)
```

```{r, load-data, , echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
dataset2 <- read_csv("dataset2.csv")
dataset2 <- as.data.frame(unclass(dataset2),stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
dataset2$age_r <- dataset2$age
dataset2$age_r <- recode(dataset2$age_r, "c('18-24 years')='18-24 years';c('25-44 years') = '25-44 years';c('45-64 years', '65 years or above') = '45 years or above'")
dataset3 <- subset(dataset2, Language=="Chi" & country=="Hong Kong", data=dataset2)
mylabels <- c(religion_scale_2_r_attend_r = 'Attending religious meeting',
religion_scale_1 = 'Self-perceived devotion',
religion_scale_3_r_pray = 'Personal pray',
religion_scale_4_r_study_r_almost_each_day = 'Studying religious books/materials',
religion_scale_4_r_study_r_each_day = 'Studying religious books/materials',
FACIT_meaning = 'Spirituality-meaning',
FACIT_peace = 'Spirituality-peace',
FACIT_faith = 'Spirituality-faith',
IES_intrusion = 'Stress response-intrusion',
IES_avoidance = 'Stress response-avoidance',
IES_hyperarousal = 'Stress response-hyperarousal',
Brief_RCOPE_postive = 'Religious coping-positive',
Brief_RCOPE_negative = 'Religious coping-negative',
rief_COPE_avoid = 'Coping-avoidance',
Brief_COPE_restruct = 'Coping-cognitive restructuring',
Brief_COPE_distract = 'Coping-distraction',
Brief_COPE_support = 'Coping-social support',
Brief_COPE_problem_solving = 'Coping-problem solving',
HADS_anxiety = 'Anxiety',
HADS_anxiety_group_r = 'Anxiety',
HADS_depression = 'Depression',
HADS_depression_group_r = 'Depression',
sdi = 'Social deprivation index',
age = 'Age',
age_r = 'Age',
gender = 'Gender',
edu = 'Education',
edu_r = 'Education',
bachelor_above = 'Bachelor degree or above',
occupation_status = 'Employment status',
occupation_status_r = 'Employment status',
occupation = 'Occupation',
high_income = 'High income',
married = 'Married',
self_own = 'Leasehold ',
private_housing = 'Living in private housing',
living_with_family = 'Living with family member',
salary = 'Salary',
covid_living_building_r  = 'COVID-19 in neighbour',
district = 'Living district',
religion_scale_2_r_attend = 'Attending religious meeting',
religion_scale_4_r_study = 'Studying religious books/materials',
religion_scale_5_r_health_important  = 'Importance of health')
label(dataset2) = as.list(mylabels[match(names(dataset3), names(mylabels))])

mycontrols  <- tableby.control(numeric.stats = c("meansd", "range"),
  cat.stats = c("countpct"),
  ordered.stats = c("countpct"),
  surv.stats = c("Nevents", "medSurv"),
  date.stats = c("median", "range"),
  selectall.stats = c("countpct"))
```

## Demographic information


```{r demographic, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ age + age_r + gender + self_own + private_housing + living_with_family + edu_r + occupation_status + occupation_status_r + occupation + salary + covid_living_building_r + district, data=dataset2, control=mycontrols))
```

## Spirituality

```{r spirituality, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ FACIT_meaning + FACIT_peace + FACIT_faith, data=dataset2))
```

## Religion behaviour and belief

```{r religion, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ religion_scale_1 + religion_scale_2_r_attend + religion_scale_3_r_pray + religion_scale_4_r_study + religion_scale_5_r_health_important, data=dataset2))
```

## Perceived Stress

```{r stress, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal, data=dataset2))
```

## Coping

```{r coping, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ Brief_RCOPE_postive + Brief_RCOPE_negative, data=dataset2))
```

## Mental Health

```{r mental, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ HADS_anxiety + HADS_anxiety_group_r + HADS_depression + HADS_depression_group_r, data=dataset2))
```

## Difference

```{r difference, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(religion_scale_2_r_attend_r ~ religion_scale_1 + religion_scale_3_r_pray + religion_scale_4_r_study_r_almost_each_day + FACIT_meaning + FACIT_peace + FACIT_faith + IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal + Brief_RCOPE_postive + Brief_RCOPE_negative + HADS_anxiety + HADS_depression + sdi + age_r + gender + bachelor_above + occupation_status_r + high_income + married + self_own + private_housing + living_with_family, data=dataset2, control=mycontrols))
```

## Regression Result

# Mental Health

```{r Regression, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(modelsum(list(HADS_anxiety, HADS_depression) ~ religion_scale_2_r_attend_r, 
adjust= ~  religion_scale_3_r_pray + IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal + gender + age_r + married, data=dataset2), term.name = TRUE)
```
